untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ADF/KPSS statistical tests for mean reversion detection and half-life calculation of Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process, which are not available in the allowed indicators list. These are advanced econometric tests that cannot be replicated with standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using SMA deviation and returns magnitude as proxies for mean-reversion conditions, but this does not capture the statistical rigor of ADF/KPSS tests or half-life analysis required by the original signal. Recommend implementing custom statistical indicators for proper Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process validation.
